title: The Whispering Fog
trigger_condition: When traveling through marshlands at dawn with low sanity
description: An unnaturally thick, pale green fog rolls across the wetlands. Strange, whispering voices echo through the mist, seeming to call your name. The air grows cold, and ghostly shapes flicker at the edge of your vision. Your compass spins wildly, and familiar landmarks seem to shift positions.

choices.option: Follow the whispers deeper into the fog
choices.consequence: Gain temporary supernatural insight (+15% to perception checks for 24 hours) but lose 30 sanity and risk encountering hostile spectral entities

choices.option: Build a protective circle and wait it out
choices.consequence: Lose 6 hours of travel time and consume resources, but maintain current sanity and avoid direct danger

choices.option: Use flares to burn away the mist
choices.consequence: Immediately dispels the fog but consumes 3 flare resources and attracts attention from nearby creatures due to the bright light

choices.option: Cover ears and navigate by touch alone
choices.consequence: Successfully navigate through with minimal sanity loss (-10) but risk stumbling into environmental hazards like sinkholes or contaminated water
